title: Execution snapshot source contract
goal: Fix the /bureau and /checkouts loading contract so generated artifacts are the primary source, fixtures are explicit fallback/demo data, and missing/corrupt/stale states are rendered honestly.

acceptance.assertion: Controllers check artifacts/bureau-tasks.json and artifacts/checkout-inventory.json before fixture fallbacks.
UI metadata distinguishes artifact, fixture, missing and corrupt states; a fixture is never labeled artifact.
Strict/internal runtime behavior for missing snapshots is documented and does not silently show green status.

metadata.priority_reason: P1: producer path and controller default disagree
